svg.text: Simplified visual ERD based on the latest schema. Only major entities and key presentation columns are shown.
Core admissions flow, course ownership, and main user records.
Service requests and scholarship processing centered on the student entity.
Figure 3. Needs Assessment and Forms Module
Needs assessment is represented through forms, submissions, and answers.
Each student submits one response per form, while answers store the per-question details.
Student participation and feedback around campus events.
